name: ios-simulator-embed
description: macOS only: stream the iOS Simulator into a VS Code webview (ScreenCaptureKit) and forward touches (SimulatorKit Indigo HID).

commands.title: iOS Simulator: Touch / MAP debug checklist

ios-simulator-embed.targetBundleId.description: If set, only windows whose owning bundle ID equals this value are streamed (copy bundleId from “List capture windows” NDJSON). Example: com.apple.iphonesimulator

ios-simulator-embed.simulatorUdid.description: Booted simulator UDID for Indigo touch injection (`xcrun simctl list devices | grep Booted`). Leave empty if only one simulator is booted.

ios-simulator-embed.debugTouches.description: Log each touch to the Output panel (iOS Simulator Embed) and show a small coordinate HUD in the stream webview.

ios-simulator-embed.debugTouchPipeline.description: Verbose touch pipeline: native helper echoes OK:d|m|u after each accepted HID send; extension logs throttled (skipped) moves and a one-line gesture summary on pointer up. Uses Output → “iOS Simulator Embed”. Start a new touch session after toggling (release pointer, or stop/reopen the stream panel).

ios-simulator-embed.debugMap.description: Log LCD letterbox (MAP) diagnostics: show Output when MAP is skipped, reject reasons, and verbose MAP_DEBUG from the native stream helper.

ios-simulator-embed.mapStackVerticalLett.description: MAP: treat vertical letterbox as chrome above the LCD only (padBottom = 0, LCD bottom-aligned in the captured window). Disable to use centered vertical fit (equal padTop/padBottom).

ios-simulator-embed.streamMaxWidthPx.description: Max width of the streamed image in the panel (CSS px). The image keeps aspect ratio and never exceeds the panel width. Use 0 for no cap (fill the panel width). Default 430 matches a typical phone width so the stream does not stretch across a wide editor.

ios-simulator-embed.streamMaxHeightPx.description: Optional max height of the streamed image (CSS px). 0 means no height cap (height follows width and aspect ratio).

ios-simulator-embed.streamShowUsageHint.description: Show the expandable MAP / debug / toolbar help block at the top of the stream panel. When false, only a one-line reminder is shown.

ios-simulator-embed.streamJpegQuality.description: JPEG quality (0–1) for ScreenCaptureKit frames. Higher = sharper and larger. Reopen the streamed panel after changing.

ios-simulator-embed.homeToolbarSingleWai.description: After one Home toolbar click, wait this long (ms) before sending a single ⌘⇧H if no second click arrives.

ios-simulator-embed.homeToolbarDoubleFlu.description: After a second Home click (double-press), wait this long (ms) before sending two ⌘⇧H presses.

ios-simulator-embed.homeAfterSimulatorAc.description: AppleScript delay (ms) after activating Simulator before the first ⌘⇧H.

ios-simulator-embed.homeBetweenDoubleHom.description: Delay (ms) between the two ⌘⇧H key events when performing a double home (app switcher).

ios-simulator-embed.homeBeforeRestoreFoc.description: AppleScript delay (ms) after the last ⌘⇧H before returning focus to the previous app.
